title: Sales Analytics Genie Space
description: AI-powered analytics space for exploring sales data including orders, customers, and products.
sample_questions: What are the top 10 products by total revenue?
Show me monthly order trends for the last 12 months.
Which customers have the highest lifetime value?
What is the average order value by product category?
Show me the distribution of orders by region.
instructions: When asked about revenue, always use the total_amount column from the orders table.
Customer lifetime value should be calculated as the sum of all order amounts for each customer.
Date-based analyses should default to the last 12 months unless otherwise specified.
Product categories are stored in the products table and can be joined with orders via product_id.

example_sqls.question: What are the top 10 products by total revenue?
example_sqls.sql: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(o.total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM {{catalog}}.{{schema}}.orders o JOIN {{catalog}}.{{schema}}.products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10

example_sqls.question: Show me monthly order trends for the last 12 months.
example_sqls.sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS order_month, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM {{catalog}}.{{schema}}.orders WHERE order_date >= DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), -365) GROUP BY order_month ORDER BY order_month
